H2: Custom Dry Erase Magnet FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Dry Erase Magnets

Create Your Custom Dry Erase Magnets Today

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Custom Dry Erase Magnets - Design & Order Online Choose Size, Upload Design, or Use Our Designer Perfect for Home, Office & Classroom Organization Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Create Your Custom Dry Erase Magnets Today

Transform any magnetic surface into a writable workspace with custom dry erase magnets from Decals.com. These versatile organizational tools combine the convenience of magnetic mounting with the functionality of dry erase surfaces, making them perfect for kitchen shopping lists, office task boards, classroom activities, and home organization systems. See also [rectangle label sheets](https://www.decals.com/labels/label-sheets/rectangle-label-sheets).

Our dry erase magnets feature a durable laminated surface that works with standard dry erase markers and erases cleanly without ghosting. Each magnet is printed with your custom design and includes a protective laminate finish that ensures long-lasting performance in both indoor applications.

Design your dry erase magnets using our intuitive online designer tool, or upload your own artwork for professional printing. Available in multiple sizes and finishing options including die-cut shapes, square cut, or square cut with rounded corners to match your specific organizational needs.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Order Custom Dry Erase Magnets

Ordering your custom dry erase magnets is simple with our streamlined process designed to get your organizational tools printed and delivered quickly. Choose from two convenient design methods to create magnets that match your exact specifications.

Design Process

Use our easy-to-navigate online designer to create dry erase magnets from scratch by uploading images, adding text, or selecting from our extensive clipart library. Alternatively, upload your own print-ready file in EPS format to ensure the highest quality output for your custom dry erase magnet project.

Once you've completed your design and added the product to your cart, select your preferred shipping method to receive an estimated delivery date. Our system will generate a digital proof that gets emailed to you for approval before production begins.

Payment

All custom dry erase magnet orders require full payment before production begins. We accept all major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. Check payments are also accepted but must be received and cleared before your dry erase magnets enter the production queue.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your dry erase magnet order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email that provides real-time updates on your order's progress. This proprietary system lets you monitor every stage of production, from order placement through delivery, giving you complete visibility into your custom magnet project timeline.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Dry Erase Magnet Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule offers multiple turnaround options for custom dry erase magnets, allowing you to select the timeline that best fits your project needs. Production begins after proof approval and payment confirmation, with turnaround times separate from shipping duration.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Get your custom dry erase magnets in just one business day with our priority production service. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day rushes may be available - contact customer service for availability and pricing.

2 Business Days Express Production

Our express production option delivers professionally printed dry erase magnets in two business days. This popular choice balances speed with cost-effectiveness for most custom magnet projects. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST start production the next business day.

3 Business Days Standard Production

The most popular fast turnaround option for dry erase magnets, offering free production within three business days. This standard timeframe provides excellent speed for almost any custom magnet order while maintaining our quality standards.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Save money on your custom dry erase magnet order by selecting our 5-day saver production option. Perfect for projects with flexible deadlines, this option delivers the same high-quality printing at a reduced production cost.

Important: Production time begins when file upload is complete and proof approval is received. Total delivery time includes both production time and selected shipping method duration.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Custom Dry Erase Magnets

Choose from multiple finishing options to create dry erase magnets that perfectly match your organizational needs. All magnetic products include a protective laminate finish that enhances durability and ensures smooth dry erase marker performance.

Die Cut Dry Erase Magnets

Create custom-shaped dry erase magnets that follow the contours of your design. Die cutting allows for unique shapes beyond standard rectangles, perfect for branded organizational tools or creative classroom applications. The cutting follows your artwork outline for a professional custom appearance.

Square Cut with Rounded Corners

Our standard finishing option provides a professional look with slightly rounded corners that prevent lifting and enhance durability. This popular choice works well for most dry erase magnet applications while maintaining easy handling and professional presentation.

Square Cut Dry Erase Magnets

Clean, sharp rectangular edges provide a traditional appearance for custom dry erase magnets. Square cutting works well for text-heavy designs, organizational charts, or applications where precise rectangular dimensions are important for your layout.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Dry Erase Magnets

Proper artwork preparation ensures your custom dry erase magnets print with sharp text, vibrant colors, and professional quality. Follow our specifications to achieve the best results for your organizational magnets.

Preferred File Types

For optimal dry erase magnet printing quality, submit vector files in Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated PostScript) or PDF format. These file types maintain crisp edges and text at any size while ensuring accurate color reproduction. Convert all fonts to outlines or curves before submission to prevent font substitution issues.

Additional File Formats

We also accept high-resolution raster files including JPG, TIFF, and PNG formats for dry erase magnet projects. Raster files should be created at full size (100% scale) with a minimum resolution of 100 DPI, or proportionally higher resolution for smaller scale files.

File Setup Guidelines

Set up your dry erase magnet artwork at the exact proportional size you're ordering. Include bleed only when necessary, and clearly indicate cut lines for die-cut magnets. Avoid flattening or merging layers in PSD files, and ensure text is converted to outlines in vector files.

Design Services

If you need assistance preparing artwork for your dry erase magnets, our vectorizing and recreation services can convert low-resolution images into print-ready files. Most logos can be recreated starting at $15, with complex designs quoted individually. Professional design services ensure your magnets print with maximum quality and clarity.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Dry Erase Magnet Shipping & Delivery

Your custom dry erase magnets will be carefully packaged and shipped using reliable carriers to ensure they arrive in perfect condition. Shipping time is separate from production time, with multiple delivery speed options available to meet your timeline requirements.

Shipping Methods

We offer several shipping options for dry erase magnets, from economy ground service to expedited overnight delivery. Choose the shipping method that aligns with your deadline and budget during the checkout process. All shipments include tracking information for monitoring your delivery progress.

Shipping Time Expectations

Ground shipping typically takes 3-7 business days depending on your location, while expedited options can deliver your custom dry erase magnets in 1-3 business days. International shipping is available with extended delivery timeframes based on destination and customs processing.

Important Shipping Notes

Custom dry erase magnets are shipped flat to prevent damage during transit. Economy shipping may experience longer delivery times during peak seasons, while priority shipping methods maintain consistent delivery schedules. Track your shipment using the provided tracking number for real-time delivery updates.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Applying Your Custom Dry Erase Magnets

Custom dry erase magnets are ready to use immediately upon arrival and require no additional installation steps. Simply clean your magnetic surface and position your magnets for instant organizational functionality.

Preparing the Magnetic Surface

Clean your target surface with a mild detergent solution to remove any dirt, grease, or residue that might interfere with magnetic adhesion. Dry the surface completely before applying your dry erase magnets. Suitable surfaces include refrigerators, filing cabinets, whiteboards with magnetic backing, and other ferrous metal surfaces.

Positioning Your Dry Erase Magnets

Place your custom dry erase magnets on the prepared surface, ensuring full contact for maximum magnetic hold. The magnets can be repositioned multiple times without losing their magnetic strength, making it easy to adjust placement for optimal organization.

Using Dry Erase Markers

Your dry erase magnets work with standard dry erase markers and erase cleanly with a dry cloth or eraser. Avoid using permanent markers or abrasive cleaning materials that could damage the laminated surface. For best results, erase writing promptly to prevent ghosting or staining.

For additional organization ideas and custom labeling solutions, explore our complete range of organizational products designed to complement your dry erase magnet system.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Dry Erase Magnets?

Dry erase magnets are functional organizational tools that combine magnetic backing with writable dry erase surfaces. Made from flexible magnetic material with a smooth, laminated top layer, these magnets adhere to any ferrous metal surface while providing a reusable writing surface for notes, lists, schedules, and reminders. They work with standard dry erase markers and erase cleanly without leaving residue.

Custom dry erase magnets are commonly used in kitchens for shopping lists and meal planning, in offices for task tracking and team communication, in classrooms for interactive learning activities, and in workshops for project notes and reminders. The magnetic backing allows for easy repositioning while the dry erase surface provides unlimited writing and erasing capability.

Design Your Custom Dry Erase Magnets Now

Ready to create organized spaces with custom dry erase magnets? Our online design tool makes it simple to create professional organizational tools that match your specific needs. Upload your logo, add custom text, or create branded magnets for your business or classroom.

With fast production times, multiple size options, and durable construction, your custom dry erase magnets will provide years of reliable organizational functionality. Start designing today and transform any magnetic surface into an efficient workspace.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Dry Erase Magnet FAQs

What material are custom dry erase magnets made from?

Custom dry erase magnets are made from flexible magnetic material with a smooth, laminated surface layer. The magnetic base provides strong adhesion to metal surfaces while the laminated top layer creates a durable writing surface that works with standard dry erase markers and erases cleanly.

What surfaces do dry erase magnets stick to?

Dry erase magnets adhere to ferrous metal surfaces including refrigerators, filing cabinets, magnetic whiteboards, lockers, and steel doors. They will not stick to non-magnetic surfaces like aluminum, copper, stainless steel, glass, or painted walls unless those surfaces have magnetic backing.

How long do dry erase magnets last?

Custom dry erase magnets are designed for long-term indoor use and will maintain their magnetic strength and writing surface quality for several years. The laminated surface resists wear from repeated writing and erasing, while the magnetic backing retains its holding power through thousands of repositioning cycles.

What is the largest size dry erase magnet you can print?

We can produce custom dry erase magnets in various sizes to accommodate different organizational needs. Contact our customer service team to discuss specific size requirements for your project, as maximum dimensions depend on your design and intended application.

Can dry erase magnets be used outdoors?

Custom dry erase magnets are designed primarily for indoor use where they provide optimal performance and longevity. Outdoor exposure to weather elements may affect the magnetic strength and dry erase surface quality over time.

Do you offer die-cut shapes for dry erase magnets?

Yes, we offer die-cutting services that allow you to create custom-shaped dry erase magnets that follow your design outline. This option is perfect for branded organizational tools, creative classroom applications, or unique promotional magnets that stand out from standard rectangular shapes.

What markers work best on dry erase magnets?

Standard dry erase markers work excellently on our custom dry erase magnets and erase cleanly with a dry cloth or eraser. Avoid using permanent markers, which can stain the surface, or abrasive cleaning materials that might damage the laminated layer.
